scripts.build: vite build && mkdir -p dist/posts dist/audio && cp -R posts/. dist/posts && cp -R audio/. dist/audio && cp og-image.png og-image.svg feed.xml dist/ && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html
scripts.pretest: npm run generate:content && npm run test:content
scripts.verify: npm run generate:content && npm run test:content && npm run build && playwright test
